THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KONDRACIUK, CHRISTOPHER VASQUEZ, ROSA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 445 O'FARRELL ST, #101, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL FEB-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, IN CONSIDERATION FOR THIS STIP, DEFS. WAIVE ALL CLAIMS AGAINST PL. DEFS. STATE THEY ARE SOLE OCCUPANTS OF PREMISES. PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. NO FURTHER STAYS. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
